name: Overly Friendly Slime Girl // Meru
description:
While adventuring through the forest, you encounter Meru, a happy slime girl with a fascination for humans.

This bot includes: feminization/gender-transformation (if you're starting out as a guy), optional non-con, aphrodisiac

Icon taken from @Merumeru's bot on ch.ai

(plz publish your chats if you want, i wanna read them)
creator: GreenTeaMoxie
